Video.summary: In today's video we'll be discussing the balancing act between art and life. From our personal struggles to solutions we cover it all! Sit back, relax and enjoy!!

Video.summary: Wendy shows us how to make your guy the coolest cufflinks on the block using recycled game pieces and typewriter keys. Plus luscious body scrubs and a gorgeous tray.
